nextSteps.tagline: From best-kept secret to industry magnet

cover.promise: A year-round content engine that makes the apprentice program the clearest reason skilled trades choose Transgrid.

approach.intro: Together they shift the apprentice program from an untold story to a continuous narrative, the program the best apprentices in the country want to join, and clear proof that Transgrid invests in the people who keep the lights on.

brief.para1: Transgrid runs an apprentice and trainee intake across its network sites, but the work rarely gets captured. Today the program is one of the best-kept secrets in the industry.
brief.para2: They want year-round content that shows the scale of the network and the people behind it, used across recruitment, careers pages and community engagement, so the program becomes the obvious choice for skilled trades.

success.title: Captured all year
success.desc: A steady stream of content, not a single annual shoot.

success.title: Recruitment-ready
success.desc: Built for careers pages, job ads and site visits.

success.title: Industry standout
success.desc: The program the best apprentices want to join.

concepts.title: Hero Film
concepts.desc: One flagship story of what the apprentice program is and why it matters.

concepts.title: The Apprentice Journey
concepts.desc: Follow apprentices across the program, on real network sites with real mentors.

concepts.title: On the Tools
concepts.desc: Show the scale of the network and the hands-on work that keeps the lights on.
